title: Sharp Shooters
writer: Randall Faye, Marion Orth, Malcolm Stuart Boylan
actors: George O'Brien, Lois Moran, Noah Young
plot: A "love-'em-and-leave-'em" sailor hooks up with a dance-hall girl in Paris while waiting for his ship to sail. She falls in love with him, and when his ship leaves port she decides to show up at its next stop and reunite with her ...
